title: Sharing Boards Within Organization
excerpt: I want to share a board with Guests but I want to share that within my organization.  How do we share a board with folks in our organization (domain ID) without having to add everyone into AD group for SSO?

posts.author: PM-MCBOCC (Bruce Keating)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to share a board with Guests but I want to share that within my organization. How do we share a board with folks in our organization (domain ID) without having to add everyone into AD group for SSO?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @PM-MCBOCC - and welcome to the community. If you want to share your board and have it read-only you can generate a URL for a specific board view by selecting the “…” menu on a view:

There are limitations as shown in the message below:

image623×590 38 KB

If editing is required and you are using SSO you will need to add the required users to the AD group as you mention.

Thanks
Mark

posts.author: bswersey (Bill)
posts.cookedHtml: I just discovered this feature and am excited to start using it however, it seems the “share” link is greyed out on some of my “sharable” boards and I can’t figure out why. Any ideas? Is the Share function documented anywhere?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @bswersey - double check that you are an Owner of the boards.

Thanks,
Mark
